title: Tutorial screen to Onboarding screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Onboarding screen displays correct start page with proper image and text per Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If the app is opened for the first time, the Tutorial screen will appear.
3. Navigate through the Tutorial screen (e.g., swipe left or tap 'Next' as applicable).
4. From the Tutorial screen, proceed to the Onboarding screen (e.g., tap 'Get Started' or similar CTA).
5. Observe the Onboarding start page that is displayed.
6. Compare the displayed image and text against the Figma design specifications.
expected: The Onboarding start page displays the correct image and text as specified in the Figma design.
